Declares functions to check if a button is stuck or if the flash is broken.

# Purpose
This C header file declares two functions: [`is_button_stuck`](<#is_button_stuck>) and [`is_flash_broken`](<#is_flash_broken>). These functions are likely used to check the status of a button and a flash component, respectively, returning a boolean value to indicate their condition. The inclusion of `<stdbool.h>` suggests that these functions return `true` or `false` to represent the status. The `#pragma once` directive is used to ensure the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
